content: Hi, I'm Skyler, and I just got back from a trip to Utah. It was amazing! The national parks, the hiking, everything was just so incredible.
Welcome back, Skyler! Utah is a great destination for anyone who loves the outdoors. What was your favorite part of the trip?
Definitely the hiking. I'm a big fan of hiking, and the trails in Utah were just incredible. I even got to hike to the top of Angels Landing, which was an amazing experience.
That sounds like a lot of fun! Hiking can be really rewarding. Do you have any plans to go hiking again soon?
Actually, I'm planning to go hiking in the Rockies next month. I've heard the trails are really great there, and I'm excited to try some new ones.
That sounds like a great plan, Skyler. The Rockies have some amazing hiking trails. What do you do for work, if you don't mind me asking?
I'm a podcast host, and I cover true crime stories. I love my job, and I get to learn about some really interesting cases.
That's fascinating, Skyler. Being a podcast host takes a lot of skill and knowledge. Do you have any hobbies or interests that you enjoy in your free time?
I actually really enjoy playing tennis. I love the competition and the exercise, and it's a great way for me to relax.
That's great, Skyler! Tennis can be really rewarding. Do you have any favorite tennis players or tournaments that you like to watch?
I really love watching the US Open. It's one of my favorite tournaments, and I always try to catch it on TV.
That's really cool, Skyler. The US Open is a great tournament. Do you have any plans to attend any tennis tournaments in the future?
Actually, I'm planning to attend the Australian Open next year. I've heard it's a really great tournament, and I'm excited to see some of the top players in action.
That sounds like a great plan, Skyler. The Australian Open is an amazing tournament. Are you currently taking any classes or pursuing any further education?
I'm actually finishing up my part-time MBA at the University of Utah. It's been a challenge, but I'm really enjoying it and learning a lot.
That's great, Skyler! Finishing an MBA is a big accomplishment. I'm sure you'll do great things with your degree.
